privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task sets up a Docker container environment to test locale and timezone configuration. Test data includes customer names: René François (French accents) and 田中 太郎 (Japanese characters) from a synthetic CSV. The verifier checks for UTF-8 locale support, Europe/Berlin timezone configuration, and successful application execution with proper character encoding in output files. Pass threshold is 70 points out of 100 total points.
